decoder_heading: Accessibility service usage
ident_heading: Accessibility service usage
heading_content_part: Accessibility service usage

decoder_heading: This app uses Accessibility Service API to provide following features:
ident_heading: This app uses Accessibility Service API to provide following features:
heading_content_part: This app uses Accessibility Service API to provide following features:- perform touch gestures on the screen: single touch and multi touch gestures- perform navigation actions: back action, home action, recent apps action- performing screenshots by using take screenshot action- displaying floating widgets across the device screen

decoder_heading: Data accessed through AccessibilityService API
ident_heading: Data accessed through AccessibilityService API
heading_content_part: Data accessed through AccessibilityService API:With usage of accessibility service API app displays floating window with view attached which captures touch input and its details: X and Y coordinates of touch, count of fingers used to perform touch and its duration. \This data could be saved if you, the user, decide so. Saved data is used to reproduce your touch input later on your demand using Accessibility Service API.

decoder_heading: Data accessed through AccessibilityService API
ident_heading: Data accessed through AccessibilityService API
heading_content_part: Data described above is not shared in anyway with any third party and it stays locally on your phone, unless you, the user, decide to export the data outside the app using export option, where exporting is saving the touch-related data (x and y coordinates, finger count, touch duration, repeat count) to external file in directory indicated by you, the user.
